translations:
sie
			verteilen sie auf die Teller

Preterit.turoyo: Naqqa әmmo, rmalle kulle, w rmalle all ste ‘004_NE_Ditin_Hezar; 11:48
translations:
Then
			she (the witch) says – they had put (the food into) all (plates
			of the guests), and they put for all of them (the witch, the boy
			and the girl)’
